briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — The Synapse bankruptcy has left thousands of Americans unable to access their savings, highlighting systemic risks in fintech middleware and BaaS models.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are transitioning to a sovereign payment system in 2026, signalling a major shift away from Visa and Mastercard dominance.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape globally.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's growing ambitions in financial data and credit services.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Hot bet summer? Soon Canadians will be able to trade on prediction markets](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/prediction-markets-wealthsimple-9.7239575?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Wealthsimple and others are preparing to offer Canadians access to prediction markets, opening a new frontier in retail financial products.

- **[Questrade launches custom indexing as massive IPOs reshape the market](https://betakit.com/questrade-launches-custom-indexing-as-massive-ipos-reshape-the-market/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian investment platform Questrade is rolling out custom indexing features for retail investors amid a wave of major IPO activity reshaping equity markets.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada formally flagged screen scraping as a security risk and set an open banking implementation target, a foundational step still shaping the country's financial data reform agenda.

- **[Bell and Canadian AI firm Cohere sign deal to operate models using Bell infrastructure](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/bell-cohere-ai-infrastructure-deal-9.7240577?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Bell Canada and homegrown AI company Cohere have partnered to run large language models on Bell's domestic infrastructure, reinforcing Canada's AI sovereignty ambitions.

- **[Canada bans "sophisticated deepfakes" of political figures](https://betakit.com/canada-bans-sophisticated-deepfakes-of-political-figures/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada has enacted legislation banning sophisticated AI-generated deepfakes of political figures, with implications for digital trust and fraud prevention in financial services.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Cybersecurity coding bootcamp aims to help Canadian veterans transition to tech jobs](https://betakit.com/cybersecurity-coding-bootcamp-aims-to-help-canadian-veterans-transition-to-tech-jobs/)** — *BetaKit* — A new cybersecurity bootcamp tailored for Canadian veterans is building pathways into tech careers, relevant to Atlantic Canada's workforce development and growing fintech talent pipeline.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is transforming traditional credit card products with embedded rewards, BNPL hybrids, and niche offerings — a trend worth watching for Atlantic Canadian credit unions and financial institutions exploring differentiated member products.
